creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Re: <https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi/help.html> (linked from the foot of the page)

----

<https://man.freebsd.org/curs_add_wch/3> (without the x) appears to be valid. 

Compare the effects of these three URLs: 

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=curs_add_wch&sektion=3&manpath=freebsd-release>

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=curs_add_wch&sektion=3x&manpath=freebsd-release>

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=curs_add_wch&sektion=3X&manpath=freebsd-release>

- only the first URL (with neither an x nor an X) results in preselection of 
  '3 - Subroutines' in the first of the four menus.
